context_note: Mexico vs South Korea, WC2026 Group B, Round 2. Mexico HOME VENUE (altitude ~1560m, Guadalajara). Both won R1 (MEX 2-0 RSA, KOR 2-1 CZE). Mexico mild favorite 47.6%, draw 30.1%, Korea 23.3%. RULE8 FIRES: draw price 30.07% → shrink comparison props toward/below 0.50. Referee: Felix Zwayer (GER) — strict European referee ~4 YC/game at WC2022 → upward shade on cards. KEY: Berterame NOT IN SQUAD (absent from 25-player ESPN roster). Son Heung-min IS starting for Korea.

referee.name: Felix Zwayer
referee.profile: Strict European referee, ~4 YC/game at WC2022. Upward shade on card questions (+3pp).

confirmed_lineups.BERTERAME_STATUS: NOT IN SQUAD — Confirmed absent from ESPN 25-player roster (11 starters + 14 bench). Also absent from Smarkets player SOT and score/assist markets.

key_rules_applied.RULE8_fires: Draw price 30.07% → RULE8 active. High draw probability → shrink comparison props toward/below 0.50. Applied to Q1, Q2, Q3, Q5, Q6, Q7.
key_rules_applied.RULE9_Berterame: CRITICAL: Berterame NOT IN SQUAD. Absent from ESPN 25-player roster AND Smarkets markets. Estimate 0.05 (near-zero). Crowd expected to price ~0.40. Biggest edge in this match.
key_rules_applied.RULE15_Son: Korea win probability 23.3%. Son is expected loser's primary forward. Mild RULE15 applied: -4pp shade from market-derived 0.37 → 0.33. NOT full RULE15 because Son excels on counter-attack and 'score or assist' includes assists when chasing.
key_rules_applied.Zwayer_shade: Felix Zwayer (GER) strict referee → Cards OU3.5 shaded up from 0.4511 to 0.48.
key_rules_applied.2plus_offsides_family: Does NOT apply to Mexico (attacking home team). Mexico is the attacking side — 2+ offsides question is for the FAVORITE/ATTACKER, not the defensive underdog. Estimate from Poisson λ=1.7 (goals-intensity proxy).

Q1_Mexico_2plus_offsides.method: Poisson(λ=1.7) as goals-intensity proxy for attacking home team. P(X≥2)=0.507. RULE8 shrink -4pp → 0.47. No direct Smarkets offside market found.

Q2_compound.method: P(MEX first) × P(KOR 2H | MEX first) = 0.5471 × 0.48 = 0.263. RULE8 competitive match shrink → 0.26. P(KOR 2H | MEX first) elevated from baseline 0.4221 because Korea chases.

Q10_Son.method: P(Son scores) = 0.2383 (liquid market). P(Son assists) derived = 0.175. P(score OR assist) = 1-(1-0.2383)(1-0.175) = 0.372. Mild RULE15 -4pp → 0.33.

Q1_Mexico_2plus_offsides.note: No market anchor. Poisson from attacking home team, RULE8 shrink. 9/9 NO family does NOT apply here — Mexico is the attacker.

Q2_Mexico_first_AND_Korea_2H_goal.note: Compound. 0.5471 × 0.48 = 0.263, RULE8 shrink. Crowd anchors compounds near 0.5 then pulls down less aggressively than us.

Q3_Korea_more_corners.note: Direct from corner handicap MEX -0.5 = 0.6220. P(KOR more) = 1 - 0.622 = 0.38. Liquid market.

Q4_Mexico_wins.note: Direct FTR market = 0.4763. Tier 1 liquid market, crowd anchors here.

Q5_Mexico_HT_winning.note: Direct HT result market = 0.3461. Crowd formula predicts 0.42 (crowd more optimistic on halftime leads).

Q6_3plus_total_goals.note: Direct OU2.5 market. Over = 1 - 0.5683 = 0.4317. Under-leaning match.

Q7_Korea_scores_2H.note: Direct 2H KOR OU0.5 market = 0.4221. Crowd formula: 0.46.

Q8_4plus_total_cards.note: Cards OU3.5 = 0.4511. Zwayer +3pp upward shade → 0.48. Crowd likely prices ~0.52 (optimistic on cards in physical match).

Q9_Berterame_1plus_SOT.note: QUESTION REMOVED by SportsPredict pre-match — Berterame confirmed not in squad. Platform caught it independently. Not part of final submission.

Q10_Son_score_or_assist.note: Liquid Son goalscorer 0.2383 + derived assist 0.175 → P(score OR assist) = 0.372. Mild RULE15 (Korea 23.3% win, Son is expected-loser forward) → -4pp → 0.33. NOT full RULE15 because Son is counter-attack specialist and assists included.

Q1_Mexico_2plus_offsides.note: Mexico did have 2+ offsides. Small loss, within variance.

Q2_compound.note: Korea never scored 2H; compound collapsed correctly.

Q3_Korea_more_corners.note: Korea did get more corners. Both us and crowd low, small loss.

Q5_Mexico_HT_winning.note: 0-0 at HT. Our 0.35 vs crowd 0.39 paid off.

Q6_3plus_goals.note: Only 1 total goal. Under-lean (0.43 vs crowd 0.49) confirmed.

Q7_Korea_2H_goal.note: Korea never scored. 0.42 vs crowd 0.50. Best single-Q with Q9.

Q8_4plus_cards.note: Fewer than 4 cards. Zwayer shade didn't hurt us; still beat crowd.

Q9_Son_score_or_assist.note: Son had 0 goal contribution. Mild RULE15 (0.33 vs crowd 0.42) confirmed. Best single-Q.

key_confirmations: RULE8 CONFIRMED (n+1): draw=30.07% → 1-0 low-scoring game → all under-leans correct
Son RULE15-lite CONFIRMED: even moderate RULE15 shade pays off for expected-loser superstars
Structural crowd-below lean was exactly right for this match — crowd overestimated offense throughout
